name: LLM Wiki
summary: Adds an agent-maintained project wiki with raw-source ingestion, query routing, and stale-input guardrails.
description: Prompts agents to maintain a project-local llm-wiki namespace with an input inbox, immutable raw archive, structured wiki pages, index-based retrieval, and an explicit assimilation stop rule before unrelated task work.

skills.summary: Maintains a project-local LLM wiki from raw incoming sources.

agents.summary: Owns wiki initialization, source assimilation, index maintenance, and query retrieval discipline.

scenarios.name: Initialize or Assimilate LLM Wiki
scenarios.summary: Create the llm-wiki structure or assimilate incoming source files before project work continues.
scenarios.description: Use this when a repository needs an agent-maintained wiki, when llm-wiki/_input contains unprocessed files, or when project knowledge must be structured before answering or implementation.
use_when: The project has no llm-wiki namespace yet.
llm-wiki/_input or the configured input directory contains unprocessed files.
A request depends on project knowledge that should be routed through llm-wiki/index.md.
avoid_when: The task is unrelated and the configured input directory is empty.
The repository deliberately does not want a tracked wiki namespace.

prompt_modules.summary: Recipe-owned policy module for LLM wiki source assimilation and retrieval discipline.

prompt_mutation_sets.summary: Requires the LLM wiki policy module to be present when the recipe is active.
